description: After a game broadcast is complete, the full recording must be archived for future use.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the high-resolution recording of the full game broadcast.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has the master video file.

nodes.task_description: Add metadata to the file, including the date, teams, and key players.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully tags the file with relevant metadata.

nodes.task_description: Transfer the file to the long-term video archive.
